---
title: Supported OCR Types
lang: en-US
---

# Supported OCR Types


### Send task
```javascript
// https://codebeautify.org/base64-to-image-converter
fetch("https://pro.nocaptchaai.com/solve", {
    method: "POST",
    headers:{
      "Content-Type": "application/json",
      "apikey": "apikey" // dash.nocaptchaai.com
    }
    body: JSON.stringify({
        method: "ocr", // string
        id: 107,       // int
        image: "",
    });
});

```


| ID    | Cost        | Method | Sample                  |
|-------|-------------|--------|-------------------------|
| `107` | `1000/$0.2` | `ocr ` | ![omg omg](/omgomg.png) |
| `1` | `1 request` | `ocr`    | ![probot](/probot.png)
| more | coming| soon    | ...
